headline: Can TXN's Embedded Business Extend Its Double-Digit Growth Run?
summary: Texas Instruments' embedded processing unit posts 12% revenue growth as industrial demand improves, but can the rebound hold amid uneven markets?

headline: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Joins Russell Growth Indexes, Is It Still 22% Undervalued?
summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) is back in focus after a series of index changes and a move to make key MPLAB XC Pro compilers and its machine learning development suite available to developers at no cost. See our latest analysis for Microchip Technology. The index reshuffle into several Russell growth benchmarks and the free access to MPLAB tools has coincided with a 23.34% 90 day share price return and a 35.72% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return is 20.74%,...
